core_mechanism: Incremental projection of streaming observations onto a once-fitted, fixed low-dimensional linear subspace (a mutable low-rank sketch), refining the estimate on-the-fly as each new observation arrives without refitting, with each observation monotonically tightening an error bound.
brief_reason: The abstract fits a low-rank projection once and recomputes embeddings on-the-fly as new ratings arrive, proving each new observation monotonically tightens the prediction-error envelope, which is exactly an out-of-sample incremental low-rank linear projection with a monotone error-contraction guarantee.
